chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1855 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No.5196/2022. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.9173/2021. 4. For hearing of main case. 12.04.2022 Mr. Shahid Hussain Sahito, Advocate for the petitioner. == 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. The petitioner, by way of instant constitutional petition has sought for direction against the respondents to appoint him in civil service on deceased quota basis for the reason that his father being forester died during service in year 2003. The petitioner at the time of death of his father was of 19 years’ of the age, therefore, he could have applied for his appointment on deceased quota basis soon after death of his father. No explanation is offered by the petitioner for having slept over his cause for about 19 years. Consequently the instant petition being hit by laches is dismissed in limine together with the listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Muhammad Danish* 2 Urgency is granted.
